description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in medieval or fantasy-inspired attire, featuring a fitted tunic with a cross-body harness, long sleeves, and a belt with a circular buckle. The figure wears tight pants tucked into knee-high boots and has a pair of swords sheathed on his back, suggesting a warrior or adventurer archetype. His forearms are wrapped with bracers, and he has a headband securing his hair, which is styled in a topknot. The facial expression is neutral, and the overall build is athletic and proportionate. The clothing appears to be made of fabric and leather, with metallic accents on the belt and sword hilts. The figure's stance is upright with arms extended horizontally, typical for character modeling.
description: A male adult in fantasy warrior attire with a tunic, boots, bracers, and swords sheathed on his back, standing upright with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tunic, harness, belt, bracers, and facial features clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile, topknot hairstyle, and the swords sheathed on the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the crossed harness, belt, and both sword hilts protruding from the back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and sword placement.
attribute_clothing_type: medieval-style tunic with cross-body harness, fitted pants, knee-high boots, and forearm bracers
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length hair tied in a topknot
